query:
SELECT trade_name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids
FROM drug_lens
WHERE trade_name IS NOT NULL AND trade_name != ''
GROUP BY trade_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
